title: lagerstroemia ovalifolia
intro: Lagerstroemia ovalifolia, also known as the Chinese Crape Myrtle or Pink Crape Myrtle, is a flowering plant native to southern China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving digestion, as well as lowering blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Lagerstroemia ovalifolia is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine as a topical application for skin conditions and wounds.
